landing.subtitle: Build professional resumes with real-time preview, 7 templates, and one-click PDF export. No paywall, no sign-up, no data sent to servers. 100% free and open source.
landing.featuresHeading: No Catch. No Paywall. Just Tools.
landing.previewDesc: See every change instantly as you type. Our dual-pane editor shows your final PDF in real time — no surprises at export.
landing.exportDesc: One-click PDF export — no account, no payment, no limits. ATS-friendly formatting with clean metadata, every time.
landing.reorderDesc: Drag and drop to reorder your resume sections. Tailor the layout for each role you're applying to, no copy-pasting required.
landing.templatesHeading: Pick a Style. Export for Free.
landing.templatesDesc: All 7 templates are ATS-friendly, fully customizable, and free to export, no premium tier, no watermarks.
landing.ctaDesc: No sign-up required. Your data stays in your browser. Build, export, and land the job, without paying a cent.
landing.linkedInNotConfigured: LinkedIn import is not configured yet. Add LinkedIn OAuth env values.
landing.linkedInUnavailable: LinkedIn sign-in is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.

dashboard.title: My Resumes
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your career blueprints. Each version is optimized for authority and editorial precision.
dashboard.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.chooseTemplateDesc: Start with a pre-filled template or customize from scratch.
dashboard.importError: Unable to import your LinkedIn profile right now.
